abstract: Specifies the list of keychains to use in the default keychain search list.
overview:
## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

The default keychain search list is used by several functions; see for example [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSearchCreateFromAttributes], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainFindInternetPassword(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)], or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainFindGenericPassword(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)]. To obtain the current default keychain search list, use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainCopySearchList(_:)] function.

The default keychain search list is displayed as the keychain list in the Keychain Access utility. If you use [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSetSearchList(_:)] to change the keychain search list, the list displayed in Keychain Access changes accordingly.

# SecKeychainSetSearchList(_:)

**Function**

Specifies the list of keychains to use in the default keychain search list.

## Declaration

```swift
func SecKeychainSetSearchList(_ searchList: CFArray) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **searchList**: An array of keychain references (of type [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychain]) specifying the list of keychains to use in the default keychain search list. Passing an empty array clears the search list.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

The default keychain search list is used by several functions; see for example [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSearchCreateFromAttributes], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainFindInternetPassword(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)], or [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainFindGenericPassword(_:_:_:_:_:_:_:_:)]. To obtain the current default keychain search list, use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainCopySearchList(_:)] function.

The default keychain search list is displayed as the keychain list in the Keychain Access utility. If you use [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainSetSearchList(_:)] to change the keychain search list, the list displayed in Keychain Access changes accordingly.
